creator: cem@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Guido Falsi from comment #59)
+1, let's add it back.  I'm not experiencing the issue yet because I'm still on 4.14.

(In reply to Guido Falsi from comment #60)
Even if it caused a 30 second vty<->Xorg switch delay, that seems better to me than a broken up arrow.  I don't switch vty<->Xorg often (or ever).
